Dataverse._ClientSecret_comment: DEPRECATED (AUTHV2-042 Phase C): All BFF Dataverse service-context flows now use DefaultAzureCredential (App Service managed identity). Setting is retained as a no-op for backward compatibility; safe to remove from Key Vault after deploy verification. Operator action required before deploy: App Service MI (PrincipalId 56ae2188-c978-4734-ad16-0bc288973f20) must be configured as a Dataverse Application User in BOTH spaarkedev1 + spaarke-demo environments with the security roles previously held by the BFF app registration.

Graph._ManagedIdentity_comment: Task 041 (Phase C): When Enabled=true, GraphClientFactory.CreateAppOnlyClient() uses DefaultAzureCredential (App Service managed identity) instead of ClientSecretCredential. DefaultAzureCredential chains through dev credentials (EnvironmentCredential, AzureCliCredential, VisualStudioCredential, etc.) so local dev still works without code changes (run `az login`). Set ClientId only when using User-Assigned MI; leave null for system-assigned MI. OBO flow (per-user) is unaffected — still uses API_CLIENT_SECRET via ConfidentialClientApplication. Per-tenant container-type configs in SpeAdminGraphService also unaffected (they use per-customer app reg secrets from Key Vault). Operator action required before deploy with Enabled=true: grant the App Service MI service principal the same Microsoft Graph application permissions previously granted to the BFF app registration (FileStorageContainer.Selected, Files.Read.All, etc.).

Spaarke._Graph_TodoSync_comment: smart-todo-decoupling-r3 Phase 6 (task 018): Feature gate for the Microsoft Graph /me/todo sync layer. When Enabled=false (default), the BFF binds Null-Object impls of ITodoGraphSyncHandler / ISpaarkeListProvisioner / ITodoSubscriptionManager / ITodoSyncBackfiller (ADR-032 P2 quiet semantics) and no Graph traffic flows for todo sync. Phase 7 (tasks 061/062/063/065) adds the real impls. Until D-1 (Tasks.ReadWrite scope), D-4 (Modern UCI app id), and D-5 (Service Bus 'todosync' queue) are all confirmed in the target environment, ship with Enabled=false. Real impls require the Graph subscription manager extension + Service Bus job pipeline; see project design.md §6.
Spaarke._Environment_comment: smart-todo-decoupling-r3 Phase 7 (task 060, FR-25): Modern UCI host (org base URL) used by DeepLinkBuilder to populate Graph linkedResources[0].webUrl. Environment-specific; NO hardcoded value in source. Example: https://spaarkedev1.crm.dynamics.com. Placeholder values are intentional — replace per environment via deploy-time token substitution.
Spaarke._ModelDrivenApps_comment: smart-todo-decoupling-r3 Phase 7 (task 060, FR-25, D-4, UQ-2): Canonical Modern UCI app id (GUID) hosting the sprk_todo form. Environment-specific — coordinate with environment owner. NO hardcoded value in source. Example: 0a1b2c3d-4e5f-6789-abcd-ef0123456789.

EmbeddingMigration._comment: DEPRECATED: Migration to 3072-dim vectors complete (Phase 5d). Service remains registered but disabled.

ScheduledRagIndexing._comment: Periodic catch-up indexing for documents that were not indexed on upload. Submits bulk indexing jobs.

Email._WebhookSigningKey_comment: Task 044: HMAC-SHA256 signing key for /api/v1/emails/webhook-trigger. Must match the secret configured on the Dataverse Service Endpoint (HttpHeader or WebKey auth). Rotate on incident or every 90 days. Filter is fail-closed.

AiSearch._AllowedIndexes_comment: Multi-container-multi-index-r1 (Phase B, FR-BFF-06): allow-list of physical AI Search index names that callers may target via the per-record / per-request searchIndexName parameter on IKnowledgeDeploymentService.GetSearchClientAsync. Requests specifying an indexName NOT in this list MUST be rejected by the resolver with ProblemDetails 400 + stable error code INDEX_NOT_ALLOWED (ADR-019 + NFR-08). Empty array means no caller-supplied indexes accepted (the 2-tier Dataverse → appsettings fallback still applies when indexName is omitted).

AzureOpenAI._classificationModelComment: AIPU2-004: Dedicated Layer 2 classification deployment (capability routing, safety pre-checks, feedback triage, session summarization). Isolated 30K-TPM quota. Set to 'gpt-4o-mini' to fall back to the shared deployment if spaarke-gpt4o-mini is not provisioned.

Communication._WebhookSigningKey_comment: Task 044: HMAC-SHA256 signing key for /api/communications/incoming-webhook (X-Hub-Signature-256 header). Used when a signing relay (Logic App / Function / APIM) sits in front of the endpoint and signs Graph notifications on Graph's behalf, since Graph itself does not sign bodies. Together with the in-body clientState check, this provides defense-in-depth. Rotate on incident or every 90 days. Filter is fail-closed.

Workspace._SummarizePlaybookCode_comment: chat-routing-redesign-r1 task 012 / spec FR-04: Stable code (introduced by Pattern A migration) for the 'Summarize New File(s)' playbook used by WorkspaceFileEndpoints (POST /api/workspace/files/summarize). Bound into WorkspaceOptions.SummarizePlaybookCode. Task 019 will migrate the endpoint to resolve this via IPlaybookLookupService.GetByCodeAsync; until then the endpoint continues to use WorkspaceOptions.SummarizePlaybookId for backward-compat.
Workspace._ChatSummarizePlaybookCode_comment: chat-routing-redesign-r1 task 013 / spec FR-05: Stable code for the chat-side 'summarize document' playbook. Pre-seated in WorkspaceOptions by task 013 (CRIT-1 race-condition fix) so wave 1-E task 016 can migrate the consumer without colliding on WorkspaceOptions.cs. Resolved at runtime via IPlaybookLookupService.GetByCodeAsync per ADR-018.
Workspace._MatterPreFillPlaybookCode_comment: chat-routing-redesign-r1 task 013 / spec FR-02 + NFR-07: Stable code for the 'Create New Matter Pre-Fill' playbook. Pre-seated in WorkspaceOptions by task 013 (CRIT-1 race-condition fix) so wave 1-E task 017 can migrate MatterPreFillService without colliding on WorkspaceOptions.cs. NFR-07 contract (45s timeout, useAiPrefill, $choices envelope) preserved across migration.
Workspace._ProjectPreFillPlaybookCode_comment: chat-routing-redesign-r1 task 013 / spec FR-02 + NFR-07: Stable code for the 'Create New Project Pre-Fill' playbook. Pre-seated in WorkspaceOptions by task 013 (CRIT-1 race-condition fix) so wave 1-E task 018 can migrate ProjectPreFillService without colliding on WorkspaceOptions.cs. NFR-07 contract preserved across migration.
Workspace._AiSummaryPlaybookCode_comment: chat-routing-redesign-r1 task 013 / spec FR-02: Stable code for the WorkspaceAiService AI summary playbook. Value intentionally LEFT EMPTY pending task 018 — the canonical stable-code value is confirmed and populated then. Until task 018 lands, the consumer falls back to WorkspaceOptions.AiSummaryPlaybookId for backward-compat.

CosmosPersistence._comment: Cosmos DB configuration for AI Platform persistence (AIPU2-030, AIPU2-033). Access via DefaultAzureCredential (Managed Identity) — no connection strings or master keys.

Insights._Playbooks_comment: Per-environment map of canonical Insights playbook names -> Dataverse sprk_analysisplaybook row Guid. See InsightsPlaybookNameMapOptions.cs XML doc. Seeded by scripts/Deploy-Playbook.ps1; consumed by /api/insights/ask (and by Insights Engine Widgets r1 InsightSummaryCard via IInsightsAi.AnswerQuestionAsync). NOTE on key naming: file-source binding (appsettings.json) accepts hyphens/@; App Service POSIX env-var rules forbid them, so when configuring via Application Settings use snake_case_only form (predict_matter_cost_v1 / matter_health_single). The map lookup is case-insensitive (see InsightsPlaybookNameMapOptions.ResolveOrDefault).

Map._dev_seed_comment: Spaarke Dev environment (spaarkedev1.crm.dynamics.com) playbook Guids. Updated by Insights Engine Widgets r1 task 023 (2026-06-11) to include matter-health-single. The predict-matter-cost@v1 and universal-ingest@v1 entries are reserved for future r2 catch-up if needed; r1 only requires matter-health-single. App Service tokenization replaces no values in this section because the Guids are environment-specific and known at deploy time of the source-controlled file.
